scope: isolated normal-COR sensitivity overlay over current mainline-v2 table tangent response

coordinateContract.outputBoundary: raw table contact response before post-table flight

reportRelation.context: stationary racket impact in supplied report; not a ball-table measurement

method.grid: full-factorial, inclusive endpoints inside each independent 2017 before range

variants.label: current mainline policy + report COR overlay (total-relative)
official CoF group I representative + report COR overlay (total-relative)
official CoF group II representative + report COR overlay (total-relative)
official CoF group III representative + report COR overlay (total-relative)
current mainline policy + report COR overlay (normal-approach)
official CoF group I representative + report COR overlay (normal-approach)
official CoF group II representative + report COR overlay (normal-approach)
official CoF group III representative + report COR overlay (normal-approach)

decision.interpretation: A report-style speed-dependent normal COR overlay is a sensitivity scenario only; it does not identify a ball-table material profile.
decision.nextGate: If a future measurement is available, record normal approach speed, outgoing normal speed, tangential contact-point speed, omega vector, and contact regime together before proposing a full state-dependent table law.
